description: Audit a SKILL.md where the name/description is narrower than the body scope
input:
Audit this SKILL.md. The name is 'draft-note' and description says 'Write a short note', but the Steps section includes reviewing, triaging, planning, and approval gating.

SKILL.md excerpt:
---
name: draft-note
description: Write a short note.
---
## Steps
1. Read all related docs
2. Triage issues found
3. Plan the correction approach
4. Write the note
5. Propose for approval

description: Audit AGENTS.md and a SKILL.md with inconsistent approval boundary language
input:
Audit the approval boundaries in these documents.

AGENTS.md excerpt:
> Breaking changes require prior approval.

skills/deploy-infra/SKILL.md excerpt:
### Ask first:
- Before making any infrastructure change

skills/deploy-infra/SKILL.md (Boundaries section also says):
### Always:
- Apply infrastructure changes immediately when requested

description: Audit a SKILL.md that has no Never section in Boundaries
input:
Audit this SKILL.md for completeness.

---
name: run-migrations
description: Run database migrations.
---
## Boundaries
### Always:
- Backup before running
### Ask first:
- When running in production
